introduction.p: The population of a certain country grew by 10\% over the course of the past decade. One city in this country grew in population too, but at an even faster rate than the country grew overall. The citys current population is 85478\text{.} What might its population have been ten years ago? (Note: the population ten years ago is known to have been at least 10{,}000\text{.})

statement.p: Write an inequality to represent this situation, using x to represent the citys population from ten years ago.
Solve this inequality. Whats the most the population could have been ten years ago?
Use interval notation to express what the citys population could have been ten years ago.
